name: Spiced Pork and Apples
recipeIngredient: 1 Apple, unpeeled and sliced without core
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork across grain into very thin slices.
2. In a bowl, blend together garlic powder, ground cinnamon, ground cloves, ground nutmeg, and ground white pepper.
3. Sprinkle the spice mixture over the pork; set aside.
4. In another small bowl, mix apple juice, soy sauce, cider vinegar, and cornstarch.
5. Heat vegetable oil in a medium skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Add the pork to the skillet and cook, stirring constantly, for 4 minutes or until browned. Remove the pork from the skillet.
7. Add the sliced apples to the skillet and stir; cook until the apples are lightly browned.
8. Return the pork to the skillet. Add the apple juice mixture and stir. Cook until the sauce thickens.
9. Serve the pork over rice.
